decision_rationale: P1B repair audit of 26 sources (P1A 25 + 1 new): 18 VERIFIED, 8 PARTIAL, 0 DOWNGRADED, 0 REJECTED. verified_or_partial=26 (floor 18 -> PASS). verified_usable_now=18 (floor 12 -> PASS). All six crisis windows retain >=12 verified/partial sources (floor 3). All 6 mechanism families retain >=2 verified/partial sources (floor 2 -> PASS). Decision=SOURCE_REGISTRY_PARTIALLY_VERIFIED. P1B repair outcomes: ECB_CBD REPIN to data.ecb.europa.eu/data/datasets/CBD2; ICAP_MOVE REPIN to theice.com/iba (PARTIAL because MOVE-specific methodology PDF not relocatable, license boundary unchanged); BIS_QR_NETWORK REPIN to bis.org/publ/quarterly.htm; FED_TIMELINE REPIN to federalreserve.gov/publications/financial-stability-report.htm + federalreservehistory.org/essays/great-recession-of-200709; BOE_LDI_REVIEW REPIN to bankofengland.co.uk/financial-stability-report/2022/december-2022; PHILLY_FED_RTDSM ADDED as canonical vintage US macro source satisfying information_constraint floor. Old P1A SOURCE_REGISTRY_REJECTED verdict remains visible in docs/research/D002J_SOURCE_DOWNGRADE_LOG.md (P1A entries preserved verbatim).
